texto: Unfortunately, in a hierarchical structure, power relationships tend to determine the content; there is always the danger that a "rank-based" logic will prevail. Managers, intent on advancement, tend to supply the information they know their superiors want to hear, rather than the information they ought to hear. Large organizations tend, therefore, to become systematically stupid.
explicacao: Citação de John Médaille sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “Unfortunately, in a hierarchical structure, power relationships tend to determine the content; th…” articula reflexao, hierarchy, politics em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e politics.

texto: Anyone who objects to any government whatsoever as a form of socialism ought not to pull that socialist lever in their home, the one that makes their waste disappear in a whirlpool into the socialized sewage treatment plant.
